reviews.author: Sibin Varghese
reviews.review_body: It's a worst school i have experienced in my life. Even though they don't listen to the problems of  students Or the   parents . They want their school to be in top position.i was a 2016 batch of this school. They were used to torture my parents very much. So kindly I have a request to the parents that dont let their children's to study in this school.

reviews.author: Aakash Goswami
reviews.review_body:
Not happy with the school management I heard the news regarding the the harrasment of a sick kid over hear and his family too.
School management should be replaced by the school trustee because this behaviour is unbearable and for the repotation of the school...

reviews.author: Op man
reviews.review_body:
1) No transport system for children they have to go with private gabs or parents.
2) There is a female principal (sheeba) who is the worst principal I have ever seen in life. She never listens to the problems of children.
3) During summers there light back up is very bad, In many classes fans are also not good.
4) There are many rules and regulations in the school some rules are good but there are many rules which will frustrate you and your child.
I will recommend to go for any other school.

reviews.author: Srishti Tripathi
reviews.review_body: I was a 2020 batch student in this school. The teachers the staff everything is perfect. I loved this school and I recommend it till now to my juniors and their parents. So many memories attached to it...❤️❤️🥺

reviews.author: Priya Mishra
reviews.review_body: do NOT send your kids to this school. The whole curriculum is so messed up. Your child will totally lose their originality and creativity. No overall personality development whatsoever and the faculty is also very rude.
